member.name: T:IGCLWrapper.IGCL3DHelper
member.summary: 3D feature helper: capabilities and get/set operations.

member.name: T:IGCLWrapper.IGCLException
member.summary: Exception thrown when an IGCL API call fails

member.name: M:IGCLWrapper.IGCLException.IsNoDisplayError
member.summary: Checks if this exception is due to no display being attached/connected

member.name: T:IGCLWrapper.IGCLApi
member.summary: Main IGCL API wrapper providing safe access to Intel Graphics Control Library

member.name: M:IGCLWrapper.IGCLApi.Initialize
member.summary: Initialize the IGCL API with default settings

member.name: M:IGCLWrapper.IGCLApi.EnumerateAdapters
member.summary: Enumerate all GPU adapters in the system

member.name: M:IGCLWrapper.IGCLApi.EnumerateDisplays(System.IntPtr)
member.summary: Enumerate display outputs for a given adapter

member.name: M:IGCLWrapper.IGCLApi.MakeVersion(System.UInt32,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Create a version number from major and minor components

member.name: M:IGCLWrapper.IGCLApi.GetMajorVersion(System.UInt32)
member.summary: Extract major version from version number

member.name: M:IGCLWrapper.IGCLApi.GetMinorVersion(System.UInt32)
member.summary: Extract minor version from version number

member.name: M:IGCLWrapper.IGCLApi.GetImplVersion
member.summary: Get the IGCL implementation version

member.name: M:IGCLWrapper.IGCLApi.IsIGCLDllAvailable(System.String@)
member.summary: Check if the IGCL DLL is available in the DLL search path
member.param: Details about why the DLL could not be loaded
member.returns: True if DLL can be loaded, false otherwise

member.name: T:IGCLWrapper.IGCLApiHandle
member.summary: SafeHandle wrapper for the IGCL API handle. Ensures ctlClose is called exactly once to release native resources.

member.name: T:IGCLWrapper.IGCLApiHelper
member.summary: High-level IGCL entry point that owns the native API handle and exposes common helpers and feature factories.

member.name: M:IGCLWrapper.IGCLApiHelper.Initialize
member.summary: Initialize IGCL and return a helper that owns the API lifetime.

member.name: M:IGCLWrapper.IGCLApiHelper.IsIGCLDllAvailable(System.String@)
member.summary: Expose DLL availability check without requiring direct use of IGCLApi.

member.name: T:IGCLWrapper.IGCLDisplayHelper
member.summary: Display helper facade for IGCL display handles.

member.name: T:IGCLWrapper.IGCLEccHelper
member.summary: ECC helper: properties and state management.

member.name: T:IGCLWrapper.IGCLEngineHelper
member.summary: Engine helper: enumerate engine groups and query properties/activity.

member.name: T:IGCLWrapper.IGCLFanHelper
member.summary: Fan helper: enumerate fans, query properties, and set modes.

member.name: T:IGCLWrapper.IGCLFirmwareHelper
member.summary: Firmware helper: base and component firmware queries, PCIe link speed control.

member.name: T:IGCLWrapper.IGCLFrequencyHelper
member.summary: Frequency helper: enumerate domains, query properties/state, and set ranges.

member.name: T:IGCLWrapper.IGCLHardwareDetection
member.summary: Hardware detection utilities for Intel GPU presence

member.name: M:IGCLWrapper.IGCLHardwareDetection.HasIntelGPU(System.String@)
member.summary: Checks if an Intel GPU is present in the system via PCI Vendor ID detection
member.param: Details about why Intel GPU was not detected
member.returns: True if Intel GPU hardware is detected, false otherwise

member.name: M:IGCLWrapper.IGCLHardwareDetection.GetIntelGPUNames
member.summary: Gets detailed information about detected Intel GPUs
member.returns: Array of GPU names, or empty array if none found

member.name: T:IGCLWrapper.IGCLLedHelper
member.summary: LED helper: enumerate LEDs and get/set state.

member.name: T:IGCLWrapper.IGCLMediaHelper
member.summary: Media helper: video processing capabilities and get/set.

member.name: T:IGCLWrapper.IGCLMemoryHelper
member.summary: Memory helper: enumerate memory modules and query properties/state/bandwidth.

member.name: T:IGCLWrapper.IGCLNative
member.summary: Manual P/Invoke declarations for IGCL DLL entry points. These functions are exported from igcl.dll and must be loaded dynamically.

member.name: T:IGCLWrapper.IGCLOverclockHelper
member.summary: Overclock helper: properties, offsets, limits, telemetry, and reset.

member.name: T:IGCLWrapper.IGCLPciHelper
member.summary: PCI helper: properties and current state.

member.name: T:IGCLWrapper.IGCLPowerHelper
member.summary: Power helper: enumerate power domains, properties, energy counters, limits.

member.name: T:IGCLWrapper.IGCLTemperatureHelper
member.summary: Temperature helper: enumerate sensors, properties, and current temperature.

member.name: T:IGCLWrapper.NativeAnnotationAttribute
member.summary: Defines the annotation found in a native declaration.

member.name: M:IGCLWrapper.NativeAnnotationAttribute.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The annotation that was used in the native declaration.

member.name: P:IGCLWrapper.NativeAnnotationAttribute.Annotation
member.summary: Gets the annotation that was used in the native declaration.

member.name: T:IGCLWrapper.NativeTypeNameAttribute
member.summary: Defines the type of a member as it was used in the native signature.

member.name: M:IGCLWrapper.NativeTypeNameAttribute.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The name of the type that was used in the native signature.

member.name: P:IGCLWrapper.NativeTypeNameAttribute.Name
member.summary: Gets the name of the type that was used in the native signature.
